chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1128 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 02-10-2025 Mr. J.K. Jarwar, Advocate for the petitioner. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **** Mr. Shafique Ahmed Leghari, Advocate files Vakalatnama of Mr. Hamayoun Sheikh, Advocate on behalf of resident No.3. He also files para wise comments on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner, who, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that for redressal of his grievance, the petitioner will first exhaust his remedy before the competent authorities. Order accordingly. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
